Futbol Club Barcelona, multisports club in Barcelona, Spain, also known as Football Club of Barcelona, F.C.Barcelona, Barcelona, FC Barcelona, Barcelona FC, Football Club Barcelona, Fútbol Club Barcelona, Barça, FCB, FC Barcelona Football, F.C.B., Barcelona Football Club, F.C.
